what_it_does: SIGGRAPH 2025 framework for automatic 3D model rigging with skeleton prediction and skinning.
succinct_summary: Very high Morgan relevance: core auto-rigging reference for making arbitrary Morgan meshes animatable.
possible_use: Rig Morgan avatar meshes produced by TripoSR/TripoSG/TripoSF or other generators.
important_notes: README points to SkinTokens as successor; keep UniRig for baseline and SkinTokens for latest rig-token approach.
